name: legalquants
description: Official LegalQuants Claude Code plugin. Read-only access to the LegalQuants community knowledge corpus for approved members.

plugins.name: lq
plugins.description: LegalQuants community access — TWO read-only MCP servers (lqchat-mcp: primary-source chat ~19k msgs; lqbrain-mcp: ~707-note synthesis vault), /lq cold-start ('I know you'), /lq:ask cross-MCP synthesis, /lq:assess. Firebase device-code sign-in (Google → 7-day cookie, keyless verify, lqMember-gated); guests use a shared bearer. v0.4.0.
